title: Responsible Disclosure
description: Responsible disclosure coordinates vulnerability reporting and patching to reduce exploit windows. In Bitcoin, disclosure timing and communication quality can have ecosystem-wide impact.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Responsible disclosure
resources.notes: Process guidance from historical incidents and response lessons.

resources.notes: Catalog of vulnerability classes and publication history.

resources.notes: Current reporting channel and embargo process for Bitcoin Core.
